intro: Angraecum nasutum, also known as Angraecoides nasuta, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Angraecum, belonging to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Angraecum nasutum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. In traditional medicine, Angraecum nasutum is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support immune function.
